programme.title: Casualty 24/7
programme.desc: Paramedics take Shaun, 53, to resus after he collapses at home following multiple seizures. Time is of the essence to determine what might be triggering his seizures. Harriet, eight, has a suspected broken toe. If an x-ray reveals that her toe is dislocated, it will need to be manipulated back into position. Paramedics bring in 94-year-old Margaret, who has a high heart rate and dangerously low oxygen levels. And 79-year-old Tommy, with a history of heart attacks, arrives. He's all too familiar with Barnsley Casualty having been in numerous times, so volunteer Jane pops in to see him. Series Prod: Kayleigh Smith; Prods/Dirs: Philip Hirst/Matt Lees/Anna Evans; Series Dir: Joe Lister; Exec Prods: Kerry Brierley/Elaine Hackett; Crackit Productions Limited (S11 Ep3)
In Barnsley's Casualty department, it's a battle of life and death every single day.

programme.title: Surgeons: A Matter of Life or Death
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Alfie's life is slowly being destroyed by an incredibly rare tumour growing at speed into his nose and cheek. Alfie must have surgery - and fast - but it's a deeply complex process. Surgeon Shaz Ahmed must delicately attempt to free up the mass, before pushing the tumour back down Alfie's airway and out through his mouth. Elizabeth's kidneys have grown to the size of two watermelons and are threatening to swamp her vital organs. Surgeon Mr Bhatt must remove both of them before her health deteriorates any further. Finally, after radiotherapy to treat skin cancer on his forehead, Simon has been left with a significant area where the skull is crumbling. He is now at risk of a potentially life-threatening infection and neurosurgeon David Davies and plastic surgeon Marco Malahias believe there is not a moment to lose. Series Prods: Sue Learoyd/Lizzie Faulkner; Prods/Dirs: Luke Farrell/Alex Gower-Jackson; Exec Prod: Malcolm Brinkworth; Brinkworth Productions Ltd (S3 Ep3/6)
Remarkable life-saving operations and extraordinary stories of surgical skill.
